policy: External RSS is used only as source material. Publish only Czech own-words SEO articles with FAQ, image brief and clear travel impact.

items.title: Sofia’s Michelin Dream Delayed? City Says Evaluation Continues Despite Reported Setback
items.excerpt: The Michelin evaluation process for Sofia is still ongoing and there has been no final rejection, according to Anton Penev, director of the Sofia Municipality’s Tourism enterprise. He said the capital has not received a
items.originalTitle: Sofia’s Michelin Dream Delayed? City Says Evaluation Continues Despite Reported Setback
items.originalExcerpt: The Michelin evaluation process for Sofia is still ongoing and there has been no final rejection, according to Anton Penev, director of the Sofia Municipality’s Tourism enterprise. He said the capital has not received a definitive “no” from the prestigious culinary guide and that the assessment could continue over the next four to five years, during which experts will regularly visit restaurants and provide feedback. “The Michelin assessment process is not finalized, there is no ‘no’....
items.rewritePrompt:
Vytvoř z podkladu vlastní český SEO článek pro Visit Bulharsko. Nekopíruj formulace ze zdroje a nepřekládej větu po větě. Piš vlastními slovy, prakticky a bez senzace. Zaměř se jen na dopad pro české cestovatele, turistické lokality, dopravu, počasí, bezpečnost, pobřeží nebo pravidla cestování. Pokud zpráva nemá jasný cestovatelský dopad, označ ji jako NEPUBLIKOVAT.

Zdroj: Novinite / Sofia News Agency
Původní titulek: Sofia’s Michelin Dream Delayed? City Says Evaluation Continues Despite Reported Setback
Podklad: The Michelin evaluation process for Sofia is still ongoing and there has been no final rejection, according to Anton Penev, director of the Sofia Municipality’s Tourism enterprise. He said the capital has not received a definitive “no” from the prestigious culinary guide and that the assessment could continue over the next four to five years, during which experts will regularly visit restaurants and provide feedback. “The Michelin assessment process is not finalized, there is no ‘no’....
